title: Reservation
emptyCompany: No company information available for reservation.

concerns.firstTime: This is my first time at a Korean clinic
concerns.needEnglish: I need English explanation during treatment
concerns.gentlePressure: I prefer gentle pressure during massage
concerns.specificAreas: I have specific areas of concern

schedule.title: Reservation
schedule.emptyDatePrompt: Please select your first preferred date.

validation.selectDate: Please select at least one preferred date.
validation.selectTimesPerDate: Please select times for each chosen date.
validation.duplicateTimes: You can't select duplicate time slots.
validation.programNotFound: Unable to find the selected program.

payment.title: Payment
payment.tossModalHint: The payment widget opens in a modal when you continue.
payment.submitDescription: Please make sure your reservation details are correct. Once submitted, the request will be sent to the provider.
payment.toastFailed: Failed to submit reservation. Please try again.
payment.toastPaymentOrderFailed: Failed to create the payment order. Please try again.
payment.toastTossInitFailed: Unable to load Toss Payments. Please try again.
payment.toastTossRequestFailed: Failed to request payment. Please try again.
payment.tossFailedDescription: We couldn't verify your payment. Please try again.
payment.tossPendingDescription: We are checking your reservation due to a processing issue.
payment.errorRetryableFailure: A temporary payment processing error occurred. Please try again shortly.
payment.errorGenericFailure: There was a problem processing your payment.
payment.refundIntro: Some partner clinics and professionals maintain their own cancellation/refund policies.
payment.refundRule1: If a provider’s policy is stricter than KOMMA’s, the provider’s policy prevails.
payment.refundRule2: Please review the provider’s profile before booking.
payment.refundRule3: 3 days before (72+ hours): 100% refund / Up to 1 change
payment.refundRule4: 2 days before (48–71 hours): 80% refund / Up to 1 change
payment.refundRule5: 1 day before (24–47 hours): 50% refund / No changes
payment.refundRule6: Same day / No-show (0–23 hours): No refund / No changes
payment.refundAccept: I accept the Cancellation and Refund Policy.

complete.title: Reservation Complete
complete.subtitle: We will confirm it after review.
